highlights_headline: HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.3 ships one targeted product change alongside internal maintenance.

bullets.lead: Preserve and pack the Android symbols
bullets.detail: Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale.

bullets.lead: Control Flow Guard for all Windows native DLLs
bullets.detail: Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale.

bullets.lead: BufferSecurityCheck for native DLLs to resolve BinSkim BA2007
bullets.detail: Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale.

contributor_summaries.Aguilex: Control Flow Guard for all Windows native DLLs; BufferSecurityCheck for native DLLs to resolve BinSkim BA2007

preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 opened this line with internal and infrastructure work only.
